tasks.title: Replace Decred branding with Monetarium (logo + page title)
tasks.description: Replace all visible Decred branding with Monetarium branding across the explorer UI. Scope (MAIN_MANIFEST.md §2 — UI standards): - Swap the header logo image for the new Monetarium logo asset (to be provided by PM). - Replace any hardcoded 'Decred' text in the visible navbar/header with 'Monetarium'. - Replace the browser tab title ('Decred' → 'Monetarium') in the base Go template. Constraints: - The new logo is a temporary placeholder; place it under `cmd/dcrdata/public/images/` with a clear name (e.g. `monetarium-logo.svg`) so it is easy to swap later. - Both light and dark themes must look acceptable with the new logo. - No backend changes required. ## Tasks - [ ] Place the provided logo file into `cmd/dcrdata/public/images/` and update the `` src in the navbar template (`cmd/dcrdata/views/extras.tmpl` or equivalent) - [ ] Remove or replace any 'Decred' text label in the header/navbar with 'Monetarium' - [ ] Verify the logo renders correctly in both light and dark themes - [ ] Find all `` tag definitions in `cmd/dcrdata/views/` templates and replace 'Decred' with 'Monetarium' in every title string (including page-specific titles: block detail, tx detail, address, etc.)
